confirmEmailBody: We sent a link to {{email}}. Click it, come back and sign in — your first deck is waiting.

err.emailNotConfirmed: Email not confirmed yet — check your inbox.
err.emailTaken: This email is already registered. Sign in or use another one.
err.network: No connection. Check your internet and try again.
err.pwTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters.
err.pwWeak: Password is too weak. Use at least 8 characters.
err.registerFailed: Registration error. Try again — the account was not created.

fp.body: Enter your email — we'll send you a recovery link.
fp.sentBody: If such a user exists, you'll find a recovery link in your inbox. Clicking it brings you back to the Ravenof Digital sign-in.
fp.title: PASSWORD RECOVERY

intro: Dark-fantasy card battles: 8 factions, living spells, curses and graveyard magic. The deck you choose becomes your first weapon.
tagline: Pick your name. Claim your first deck. Step into Ravenof.
